googleMapsEmbedQuery: Joe the Plumber, 350 Chapel Road, South Windsor, CT 06074
about: Joe the Plumber is a family-owned plumbing company serving all of Connecticut with fast, friendly, and reliable service around the clock. Licensed, insured, and BBB accredited, they bring quality craftsmanship and honest service to every job — from emergency repairs to new construction plumbing. Their team is dedicated to leaving your home clean and your plumbing working perfectly, with no mess and no hassle.
serviceArea: All of Connecticut, with primary coverage in Hartford County including South Windsor, East Windsor, Windsor, Enfield, Manchester, Vernon, Glastonbury, Hartford, and surrounding towns. Secondary office serves the Niantic shoreline area.

designBrief.colorDirection: strong blue, white, safety orange accents, steel grey
designBrief.inspiration: Trustworthy tradesman. Clean, professional, emphasizes reliability and availability.
designBrief.avoidance: No cartoon plumbers. No clip art wrenches. No cheesy stock photos. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Clean background, bold sans-serif heading, prominent phone number CTA
designBrief.uniqueElement: Emergency service callout banner or animated service area map
